headline.purpose: The page title and only major headline.

title.purpose: Upload labels and strong control text.

label.purpose: Status messages and compact control-adjacent copy.

shadows.name: small-state-shadow
shadows.purpose: Subtle local lift for small surfaces if needed.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard-visible focus on the upload zone.

motion.name: fast-state
motion.purpose: Fast feedback for button transform, shadow, and color.

motion.name: normal-state
motion.purpose: Default transition for upload-zone background and border states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width Proofmark Red action button for generating subtitles.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { width: 100%; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #d32f2f; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b71c1c; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(211, 47, 47, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d32f2f; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #c0a0a0; color: #f0e0e0; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Upload Zone
components.description: Large dashed drop area that acts as the visible file input.
components.html: Drag & Drop file here or Click to BrowseMP3, MP4, WAV, or MOV
components.css: .ds-upload-zone { border: 2px dashed #ffcdd2; border-radius: 12px; padding: 42px 24px; background: #fffafb; color: #d32f2f; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background-color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease; outline: none; } .ds-upload-zone:hover, .ds-upload-zone:focus-visible { background: #ffebee; border-color: #d32f2f; transform: scale(1.01); } .ds-upload-zone:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(211, 47, 47, 0.25); } .ds-upload-icon { display: block; margin: 0 auto 12px; color: #d32f2f; opacity: 0.7; transition: opacity 0.3s ease; } .ds-upload-zone:hover .ds-upload-icon, .ds-upload-zone:focus-visible .ds-upload-icon { opacity: 1; } .ds-upload-label { display: block; color: #d32f2f; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-file-info { display: block; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #666666; }

components.name: Task Surface
components.description: Central white workflow panel on a warm page ground.
components.html:
AI Subtitle Generator

Upload an MP3 or video to generate perfectly paced SRT subtitles.
components.css: .ds-task-surface { background: #ffffff; color: #333333; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10); padding: 40px; text-align: center; max-width: 600px; font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-task-surface h1 { color: #d32f2f; font-size: 1.85rem; line-height: 1.15; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-task-surface p { color: #666666; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Status Message
components.description: Live-region text for processing, success, and error feedback.
components.html: Processing through AI. This may take a minute...
components.css: .ds-status { margin-top: 16px; min-height: 1.4em; font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-status-info { color: #666666; } .ds-status-success { color: #2e7d32; } .ds-status-error { color: #d32f2f; }

narrative.overview:
This system should feel like a compact production station: quiet, precise, and ready for repeated use. The page is not a marketing spectacle. It is a focused workspace where a team member can upload media, understand the processing state, and leave with a correctly named SRT file.

The visual language is professional, reliable, and minimal. It uses a restrained warm surface, a single controlled red for action and emphasis, one sans-serif type family, and simple state changes. The interface should reject generic AI SaaS patterns, toy upload-tool styling, and flashy creator-app energy.
keyCharacteristics: Single-task clarity: the upload flow is the center of the screen.
Controlled emphasis: red appears where action, focus, or state needs attention.
Calm reliability: spacing, shadows, and copy should reduce uncertainty.
Repeatable operation: controls should feel familiar and dependable.

rules.name: The Proofmark Rule
rules.body: Red is a mark of action, focus, or state. It is not a decorative brand wash.

rules.name: The Quiet Neutral Rule
rules.body: Warm neutrals should carry most of the interface. If the page starts looking like an AI landing page, the palette is doing too much.

rules.name: The Utility Type Rule
rules.body: Use one sans family and earn hierarchy through weight, size, and spacing. Do not introduce display fonts for labels, buttons, or status text.

rules.name: The Minimal Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows exist to identify the active workspace and confirm interaction. Never stack nested cards or add decorative glow.

dos: Do keep the upload-to-download workflow visually dominant.
Do use Proofmark Red for primary action, focus, and state, not decoration.
Do make loading, success, failure, file validation, and download states explicit.
Do keep controls keyboard-friendly with visible focus states.
Do use plain copy that tells the user what will happen, what is happening, and what to do next.
donts: Don't use generic AI SaaS patterns: vague gradient blobs, inflated claims, buzzword-heavy copy, or decorative "AI magic" visuals.
Don't use toy upload-tool styling: cramped spacing, cheap-looking controls, unclear states, or hobby-project polish.
Don't use flashy creator-app energy: loud colors, trend-driven visuals, excessive motion, or anything that makes the workflow feel less trustworthy.
Don't add side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or repeated identical card grids.
Don't introduce modals for validation or processing feedback when inline status messaging can do the job.
